accepted.title: Pentagon Designates Anthropic a 'Supply Chain Risk'
accepted.reason: Unanimous accept across all 3 models. First use of supply chain risk designation as political leverage against an AI lab — clear governance precedent.

accepted.title: Meta Opens WhatsApp to Rival AI Chatbots in EU
accepted.reason: Unanimous accept. EU antitrust forcing AI chatbot interoperability on dominant messaging platform — precedent-setting for AI distribution.

rejected.title: OpenAI Developing GitHub Rival
rejected.reason: Unanimous reject. Too early-stage, single-source, speculative. No confirmed product or strategic break. Watchlist item.
